prompt: App icon on black background. Bold flat vector design. Two crab claws forming eyeglasses - left claw is the left lens frame, right claw is the right lens frame, connected at center bridge. Claws are exaggerated and clearly crab-like with pointed tips. Inside left lens: bold chevron symbol. Inside right lens: bold vertical bar cursor. Uniform thick strokes. Neon green on pure black, minimal glow. Flat, no gradients. Must read clearly at small sizes.
